scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
